zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Everingham於大約1363年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾巴可頓時，她的父親Adam Everingham57歲，母親Joan d'Eiville49歲。她與Sir William Ellis IV結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1390年在英國英格蘭享年28歲，埋葬在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Everingham于大约1363年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾巴可頓时，她的父亲Adam Everingham57岁，母亲Joan d'Eiville49岁。她与Sir William Ellis IV结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1390年在英国英格兰享年28岁，埋葬在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Everingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): habitational name from Everingham (East Yorkshire), named in Old English Yferingaham ‘homestead (hām) of the people (-inga-) of Eofor’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Everingham was born about 1363, in Bacton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Adam Everingham, was 57 and her mother, Joan d'Eiville, was 49. She married Sir William Ellis IV. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1390, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 28, and was buried in Skelton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Everingham est née environ 1363, à Bacton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam Everingham, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Joan d'Eiville, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Ellis IV. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1390, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Everingham um 1363 in Bacton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam Everingham 57 und ihre Mutter Joan d'Eiville 49. Sie hat Sir William Ellis IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1390 im Alter von 28 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Skelton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Everingham è nata il circa 1363 nel Bacton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Adam Everingham, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Joan d'Eiville, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Ellis IV. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1390, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolta a Skelton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Everinghamが約1363年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアバクトンで生まれた時，父Adam Everinghamは57歳，母Joan d'Eivilleは49歳であった。Sir William Ellis IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1390年にイギリスイギリスで28歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Everingham(이)가 대략 1363년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 바크턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Everingham(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan d'Eiville(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Ellis IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Everingham nasceu aproximadamente 1363, em Bacton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam Everingham, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Joan d'Eiville, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Ellis IV. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1390, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 28 anos, e foi sepultada em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Everingham родилась около 1363 г. в местности бактон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Adam Everingham было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan d'Eiville, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Ellis IV. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1390 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Everingham nació aproximadamente 1363, en Bacton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam Everingham, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Joan d'Eiville, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Sir William Ellis IV. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1390, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultada en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
